command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && git pull --ff-only && git add kai/WORKFLOW_SYSTEMS.md kai/AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md kai/tickets/ kai/queue/healthcheck.sh agents/ra/verify.sh agents/nel/verify.sh agents/sam/verify.sh agents/aether/verify.sh agents/nel/consolidation/consolidate.sh bin/ticket.sh bin/kai.sh && git commit -m 'ship: ticket system v1.0 — 5 workflow systems, SLA escalation, agent verify gates

Implements WORKFLOW_SYSTEMS.md (from Hyo + counterpart design session):
- System 1 (Loop): Create → Verify → Simulate → Close/Reopen
- System 2 (Role Gates): Sequential gates by specialty
- System 3 (Sprint): Batch → Simulate → Ship
- System 4 (Adversarial): Builder builds, separate agent breaks
- System 5 (Memory Loop): Every task feeds back into standing instructions

Infrastructure:
- bin/ticket.sh: full ticket CLI (create/update/close/escalate/verify/sla-check)
- kai/tickets/tickets.jsonl: central ticket ledger (single source of truth)
- agents/{ra,nel,sam,aether}/verify.sh: executable gate checks per agent
- SLA auto-escalation wired into healthcheck (P1=1h, P2=4h, P3=24h)
- System 5 Memory Loop wired into nightly consolidation
- kai ticket aliased in kai.sh dispatcher

This prevents the 3-day newsletter miss pattern: blocked tickets auto-escalate,
verification scripts catch undeployed content, SLA clocks enforce resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>' && git push origin main 2>&1
